Kofam currently cannot reliably distinguish pmo from amo genes despite their distinct functions; thus, KO K10944 annotated by Kofam is not necessarily pmoA and may instead be amoA (ammonia oxidation), so confirming true pmo genes may require a curated/customized reference database.
